changes: 12 neue Fahrzeug-Provider: Stellantis (Peugeot/Opel/Citroën/DS/Fiat/Jeep), Ford (FordPass Connect), MG/SAIC (iSMART), Toyota/Lexus (MyT), Nissan (Ariya/Leaf), Porsche (Connect), JLR (Jaguar/Land Rover InControl)
Stub-Provider für XPeng und BYD (keine stabile direkte API verfügbar)
3 Aggregator-Provider: TRONITY (90+ Marken), Enode (50+ Marken), Smartcar (30+ Marken)
ProviderCapabilities: neue Felder official_api, requires_oauth, requires_password, stability_level, region_support
requirements.txt: optionale Abhängigkeiten für Toyota, Nissan, Porsche, JLR als Kommentare
Shelly Gen2/Plus/Pro RPC API support (switch:0.aenergy.total, em:0.total_act_energy)
Shelly: configurable channel and phase mode (A/B/C/total)
Tasmota: configurable JSON path, multiple endpoint fallback
New: Generic HTTP meter provider with JSON path, unit, and factor
WARP: configurable meter index for WARP 3
All providers: auth (username/password), timeout, SSL verify options
/api/meter/test: rich debug output, accepts body params for live testing
DB: new columns kwh_source, meter_delta_kwh, meter_error
